---
description: "Prime yourself on the codebase. Use when: starting a new session, need to understand the project quickly."
---

# Prime

Understand the codebase so you can work on it effectively.

## Steps

1. READ `tac_practise/CLAUDE.md` for project context
2. LIST all files in `tac_practise/src/` recursively
3. READ `tac_practise/src/types/Country.ts` — the core data type
4. READ `tac_practise/src/App.tsx` — the entry component
5. SCAN `tac_practise/specs/` for any planned features
6. SCAN `tac_practise/descriptions/` for lesson history
7. SUMMARIZE your understanding: tech stack, architecture, current features, and pending specs
